name: create_commit_message_from_changes
description: Generate a meaningful commit message from git diff or file changes.

steps.action: ./scripts/memory/traj-capture.sh --prompt 'Summarize the changes from git diff and create a commit message'

create_commit_message.description: Generate commit message from git diff (via traj-capture)
create_commit_message.note: Uses scripts/memory/traj-capture.sh (same as step 3 of this rule)

execute_commit.description: Execute git commit with the generated message
